notes: The Fancy Dishes are a furniture item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 20 SC .

The Fedora is a vanity item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC .

conditions: Feral Claws are a pre-Hardmode accessory that can be found in Jungle Crates , Bramble Crates , and Ivy Chests located in Jungle Shrines and at the base of a Living Mahogany Tree in the Underground Jungle . While equipped, it grants the following effects:

notes: The Fez is a head piece vanity item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 3 GC 50 SC .

conditions: Fireblossom is a type of herb which appears as a small, magma-colored flower. It grows naturally on Ash Blocks and Ash grass . Fireblossom can be harvested with virtually any weapon or tool , and can be planted manually using Fireblossom Seeds in Clay Pots and Planter Boxes , or on suitable soil tiles .

Fireblossom Seeds are a type of seed that can be obtained from harvesting Fireblossoms while they are blooming or using the Staff of Regrowth on naturally grown Fireblossoms while they are fully grown. А Fireblossom will bloom when the sun is setting if it is not raining, from 3:45 PM to 7:30 PM. Each plant will drop 1–3 Fireblossom Seeds when harvested while blooming.

chanceText: (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 2% / (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 1.33%

notes: The Firework Fountain is a placed novelty mechanism that, when activated, produces one of four colorful "sparkle fountain" effects. Once placed, the Fountain can be activated via wire , or by right-clicking the Fountain directly. Its effect is purely visual, causes no damage, and can be used infinitely at no cost. It is purchased from the Party Girl for 3 GC .

The Fireworks Box is a placed novelty mechanism that launches colorful visual effects. Once placed, it can be activated via wire or by right-clicking the Box directly. Each activation causes the Box to fire a random one of four possible fireworks effects that cause no damage. It can be used infinitely at no cost. The Fireworks Box is purchased from the Party Girl for 5 GC .

The Celebration is a Hardmode , post- Golem launcher that fires two firework rocket projectiles at once, consuming one rocket . The firework rockets travel for 0.75 seconds before exploding. The Celebration can be purchased from the Party Girl for 80 GC .

conditions: Seaweed is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Turtle to follow the player around. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Turtle will fly with a propeller to catch up to the player. Seaweed has a 1/50 (2%) chance of being found in Ivy Chests , located in the Underground Jungle 's Jungle Shrines or Living Mahogany Trees . On the Desktop version , Console version , and Mobile version , it also has a 1/20 (5%) chance of being obtained from Jungle Crates and Bramble Crates .

The Flame Trap is a trap found naturally in the Jungle Temple . When activated, it fires a jet of fire, which has a range of 20 ( 47) tiles, and can pierce an infinite number of targets. It has a cooldown of (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 3.33 seconds / (Old-gen console and 3DS versions) 3 seconds between firings. The flame deals 80 / 160 / 240 damage to players (40 damage to NPCs , enemies , and critters ). [ 1 ]

The Flare Gun is a weapon that provides a ranged method of illuminating areas. It fires Flares , which provide light and stick to the blocks they hit. The Flare Gun is found randomly in Gold Chests underground.

notes: The Flesh Cloning Vat is a Hardmode crafting station used to craft Flesh furniture ( Crimson -themed furniture) out of Flesh Blocks . The Flesh Cloning Vat can be purchased from the Steampunker for 10 GC , but only appears for sale in worlds that are generated with the Crimson . It can also be crafted from the Decay Chamber , its Corruption counterpart.

conditions: The Flesh Cloning Vat is a Hardmode crafting station used to craft Flesh furniture ( Crimson -themed furniture) out of Flesh Blocks . The Flesh Cloning Vat can be purchased from the Steampunker for 10 GC , but only appears for sale in worlds that are generated with the Crimson . It can also be crafted from the Decay Chamber , its Corruption counterpart.

notes: Normal mode row

conditions: Flinx Fur is a crafting material dropped by Snow Flinx , an enemy found in the Ice biome . They drop 1–2 / 1–3 Flinx Fur.

The Inner Tube is an accessory that has a 9/40 (22.5%) chance of being found in Water Chests , Ocean Crates , and Seaside Crates . When equipped, it causes the player to float on the surface of liquids instead of sinking to the bottom. This effect can be temporarily negated by holding ▼ Down . Additionally, when the player is in any liquid, the Inner Tube also grants the player the Flipper 's effect (press ↷ Jump to swim upwards) [ 1 ] and +5 Fishing Power . [ 2 ]
Flounders are a type of fish which are found plentifully by fishing in the Desert biome.
Flower Boots can occasionally be found in Ivy Chests , Jungle Crates , and Bramble Crates .

The Flying Carpet is an accessory that allows the player to float for 5 seconds [ 1 ] , similar to the Hoverboard . It can be found inside Chests located within Pyramids in the Desert . It can also be obtained by throwing a Pharaoh's Robe into Shimmer .

notes: Fogbound Dye is a dye purchased from the Dye Trader while in a Graveyard (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) for 7 GC 50 SC . When equipped, it reduces the color saturation of the item and gives it a grayer tone, with a fog-like effect overlaying on top of the item.
sourceRefName: Dye Trader while in a Graveyard

notes: The Fog Machine is a placed novelty mechanism that produces a fog cloud around it. It can be activated and deactivated via wire , but is always on by default when first placed. The fog is purely visual, has no functional effect, and can be produced infinitely at no cost. When Fog Machines are placed next to each other and are active, the fog gets thicker which makes it harder to see through. The Fog Machine is purchased from the Party Girl for 4 GC at night.
The Format:C is a Hardmode yoyo that can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 20 GC during moon phases 5–8.

The Freeze Bomb can be purchased from the Demolitionist for 10 SC at night after the Eye of Cthulhu or King Slime has been defeated.

conditions: The Frog is a harmless critter that spawns on the surface Jungle at any time. When in water, frogs will swim along the water's surface. Frogs will occasionally croak when nearby.
Frost Minnows are a type of fish which are found uncommonly by fishing in a Snow biome in any layer. They are used to craft Seafood Dinners and Warmth Potions .

The Frozen Crate is a pre-Hardmode crate that can only be fished in the Snow and Ice biome . Frozen Crates contain items found in standard crates, and always contain one item normally found in Frozen Chests . Its Hardmode counterpart is the Boreal Crate .

The Boreal Crate is a Hardmode crate that can only be fished in the Snow and Ice biome . Boreal Crates contain items found in standard crates, and always contain one item normally found in Frozen Chests . Its pre-Hardmode counterpart is the Frozen Crate .

notes: The Full Moon Squeaky Toy is a Hardmode pet-summoning item that spawns a Baby Werewolf that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Baby Werewolf flies after them by flapping its arms, mimicking a bird-like creature. The Full Moon Squeaky Toy can be purchased from the Zoologist during a Hardmode Blood Moon for 30 GC .
sourceRefName: Zoologist during a Hardmode Blood Moon for

notes: (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) The Furnace can also be purchased from the Merchant when he is in the Jungle biome for 3 SC .

notes: The Gangsta Hat is a vanity item purchased from the Clothier after the Frost Legion has been defeated.
sourceRefName: Clothier after the Frost Legion has been defeated

notes: The Gatligator is a Hardmode gun that can be purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 35 GC . When used, it rapidly fires bullets in a roughly 30° spread, at a varying velocity. It also has a 50% chance not to consume ammo .

conditions: The Geyser is a trap that spews a vertical stream of fire which deals a base damage of 40 / 80 / 120 and a knockback of 2 (Very weak) [ 1 ] . It will activate when a player touches it or when it is triggered via wire . Geysers are found naturally-placed in random areas that are deep enough to generate lava , including the Underworld and deeper Cavern areas. They are generated without Pressure Plates or wires attached to them.

notes: The Gi is an armor item that can be equipped in the shirt slot. It provides 4 defense along with a 5% damage and critical strike chance boost to weapons. It also provides a 10% melee and movement speed increase. It is purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC . The Gi will visually cover up what is equipped in the pants slot.

conditions: The Glowing Snail is an uncommon critter that only spawns in either surface or underground Glowing Mushroom biomes . It is also quite large compared to its normal counterpart . The Glowing Snail has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.

The Glow Tulip is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Caveling Gardener that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, it flies through solid tiles while holding onto a Snare Plant in order to catch up to them. The Glow Tulip can be found rarely near the left and right edges of the world below the Surface as a plant . Depending on world size , a set amount of Glow Tulips will spawn during world generation: 2 in small worlds, 4 in medium worlds, and 6 in large worlds. Half of them are usually generated on the left side and the other half on the right side of the world.

notes: The Goblorc Ears are a vanity item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC .
